details.test: Task 1: Start trial for cheapest qualifying plan
Task 2: Create spam filtering policy for marketing promotions
Task 3: Create High Quarantine Volume alert rule
Task 4: Manage allowed domains and blocked email addresses
Task 5: Schedule daily 6:00 PM quarantine summary report
Task 6: Create attachment control rule for large external attachments
Task 7: Block most frequent malware sender domain from logs
Task 8: Add mailbox with Standard Protection and SMS MFA
Task 9: Create 24-hour temporary allow rule for partner-test.com
